user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about software engineering and system architecture?
model_response:
1) Best pizza topping: Pepperoni.  
2) Black holes form when massive stars exhaust their nuclear fuel and collapse under their own gravity, leading to a singularity.  
3) Whether you should quit your job tomorrow depends on your personal circumstances and career goals; consider your financial situation and future opportunities.  
4) One thing about software engineering and system architecture: Good architecture emphasizes modularity and scalability, allowing systems to evolve and adapt to changing requirements over time.
